judge_reason: Both descriptions agree on the core visual content: a hand-drawn sketch of a mechanical pulley system with handwritten annotations, and while B adds specific quoted labels and a date not mentioned in A, there is no direct contradiction on the visual elements described.
original_image_tags: A single sheet of aged, slightly yellowed paper with handwritten notes and a hand-drawn diagram in pencil or dark ink. The page has two hole-punch marks at the top. The main content is a sketch illustrating a mechanical assembly involving weights, cables, sheaves (pulleys), plates, and a swivel mechanism. Annotations in cursive handwriting label the various components and provide explanatory notes.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A handwritten engineering sketch on lined paper showing a cable-and-pulley/sheave mechanism with several circled components, arrows, and numbered labels (including 2, 3, 4, 5), plus explanatory handwritten notes across the page.*
